testsuite.name: agentforge.agent.A2AClientTest

testcase.name: discoverAgents returns agents with matching capability
discoverAgents returns empty for unknown capability
delegate sends task to agent and returns result
delegateByCapability with no matching agent returns failure
delegateByCapability finds and delegates to matching agent
multiple agents with same capability are all discoverable
discoverAgents returns all registered cards when no filter
delegate to unknown agent returns failure

testsuite.system-out: 08:31:25.728 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.agent.AgentRuntime -- Registered agent: summarizer 08:31:25.730 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.agent.AgentRuntime -- Registered agent:
